description_long: This is a menacing, dark-colored axe with a long, cylindrical handle and a dramatic, fantasy-inspired blade. The blade features a large, crescent-shaped cutting edge on one side and a sharply pointed spike on the opposite, giving it a dual-purpose design for both chopping and piercing. The handle is straight, robust, and features two circular collars spaced along its length, likely for grip or reinforcement. The blade and handle appear to be made from a glossy, metallic material, with the blade exhibiting jagged, aggressive contours and a polished finish. The overall design is sleek and intimidating, suggesting it could be used as a prop or weapon in a stylized urban or fantasy setting. No visible markings or labels are present on the surface.
description: A sleek, dark, fantasy-style axe with a crescent blade and pointed spike, mounted on a long, straight handle with circular grip collars. The metallic finish and jagged blade design give it an intimidating, decorative appearance.
description_view_0: The axe is shown from the side, highlighting the crescent blade and pointed spike, as well as the straight handle with two circular collars.
description_view_1: The axe is viewed from the front, showing the thin profile of the blade and the cylindrical handle, with minimal blade width visible.
description_view_2: The opposite side view reveals the same crescent blade and spike, mirroring view 0, with the handle and grip collars clearly visible.
description_view_3: The rear view displays the thin edge of the blade and the straight handle, similar to view 1, with little detail of the blade's width.
attribute_handle_type: Straight, cylindrical metal handle with two circular grip collars, smooth surface, no visible curvature or ergonomic shaping.
attribute_blade_design: Large crescent-shaped blade with a sharp edge and a pointed spike on the opposite side, jagged and aggressive contours, single-edged with no beard or poll.
attribute_mounting_style: Modern, integrated metal construction with the blade and handle appearing as a single forged or molded piece.
